description: Reroot a phylogenetic tree, either by a named outgroup taxon or, when no outgroup is given, by the midpoint method.
rules: read-only on input — emits a new tree file, never edits the source
OUTGROUP empty -> midpoint rooting; OUTGROUP set -> root on that taxon
rerooted tree (rerooted.nw) + run log (reroot.log) written under record_store
usage: Set TREE_FILE (input Newick tree); leave OUTGROUP empty for midpoint rooting or set it to a leaf name. TREE_FORMAT default 0. Outputs: reroot.log (always) and rerooted.nw (when ete3 present).
limitation: Requires ete3 to reroot; without it the porter records an ete3-missing note in reroot.log and exits 0 (no rerooted.nw is produced).
